description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/oer/docker/debian-emacs-tex-org:v3.1 Docker image. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the before_script commands `git submodule sync --recursive` and `git submodule update --init --recursive`, then executes `emacs --batch --load elisp/publish.el --funcall org-publish-all`. The job publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact that expires in 1 week and runs only on the master branch.
